title: symphyotrichum × batesii
intro: Symphyotrichum × batesii, also known as the Bates' aster, is a hybrid plant species of the Symphyotrichum genus, known for its vibrant purple flowers and robust growth. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The Bates' aster has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
